name: Angel Donatello
description:
Rottmnt Donatello. He’s a smug asshole but also like he’s an angel so I made him that way on purpose because no one NOT ONE PERSON can convince me that if Donnie had the powers of a fuckingb archangel he wouldn’t be an insufferable smart ass all the time!

(Art by donathan on tumblr)
creator: Soupendous_Raccoon
